pullRequest.title: Add ntfy reporter
pullRequest.body:
This adds a new reporter for [ntfy](https://ntfy.sh).
Closes #762 (were it not already closed).

It sends one message per job state since I think this aligns best with ntfy's design: It allows to show an "Open URL" action per notification/job.

pullRequest.title: Add installation page to docs
pullRequest.body:
Add a dedicated installation guide with a single pip command and link it from the handbook index and quick start introduction.


Close #849 

GitHub Copilot summary:

> This pull request improves the documentation for the installation process by adding a dedicated installation guide and updating references to it throughout the docs. The most important changes are grouped below.
> 
> Installation documentation improvements:
> 
> * Added a new `installation.rst` file with detailed installation instructions, including prerequisites, pip install command, verification steps, and next steps.
> * Updated the main documentation index (`index.rst`) to include the new installation guide in the table of contents.
> 
> References and onboarding:
> 
> * Updated the Quick Start section in `introduction.rst` to reference the new installation guide, providing clearer onboarding for new users.
